title: Era of Magic
description: A big Magic data pack with a lot of different Spells, Casting Tools, a custom Research, Skill and Level system, new Bosses, new Mechanics, and a lot more.
body:
Did you ever want to be a real Magician? Or fight against the evil monsters of this and many other worlds? Or do you want to become a god? With Era of magic, your whole Minecraft world gets a ton of new items with special abilities and cool effects, a second leveling system for your magic, many new skills, new mobs, some strong bosses, even a few new dimensions, and a lot of different spells you can add to your armor, to your accessories and all the magic wands. Compatibility warning: This data pack is very big (and is still growing) therefore it might be difficult to use alongside other big data packs. If you still want to use it with other packs please note that there is a chance that it breaks everything and makes your world unplayable. ### Dependencies: [- Angel Core v.1.3.3](https://github.com/HeDeAnTheonlyone/Angel-Core/releases) If you find any bugs please report them here ==> [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/Era-of-Magic/EoM-datapack/issues) or here [Bug Report](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScT5R8IVlWU_ueSXchdSMkPnv_SI8Z_f0Aezz_RM_4S0O0ZDA/viewform?usp=sf_link) ### You Can Find Everything you need to know about this data pack in its Wiki ### [Era of Magic Wiki](https://angdem.gitbook.io/era-of-magic-wiki/)﻿

**Thanks to my Kofi supporter:**
deadlydude13, Arvid, Rookmonster, Alluminax, Cole Paul Walas
